  1. io.bloviate.ext
  2. BulkLoadHandle

Uses of Record Class
io.bloviate.ext.BulkLoadHandle

Packages that use BulkLoadHandle
Package
Description
io.bloviate.ext
 

  • Uses of BulkLoadHandle in io.bloviate.ext

    Methods in io.bloviate.ext that return BulkLoadHandle
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default BulkLoadHandle
    DatabaseSupport.disableConstraints(Connection connection, Database database)
    Disables foreign-key (and, where applicable, unique) enforcement for the duration of a bulk load, on the given connection's session.
    BulkLoadHandle
    MySQLSupport.disableConstraints(Connection connection, Database database)
    Disables FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS and UNIQUE_CHECKS for the session.
    BulkLoadHandle
    PostgresSupport.disableConstraints(Connection connection, Database database)
    Sets session_replication_role = replica on the connection, which stops user and foreign-key triggers (including referential-integrity checks) from firing for the session.
    static BulkLoadHandle
    BulkLoadHandle.of(String description)
    Creates a handle with the given description.
    Methods in io.bloviate.ext with parameters of type BulkLoadHandle
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    DatabaseSupport.enableConstraints(Connection connection, Database database, BulkLoadHandle handle)
    Re-enables what DatabaseSupport.disableConstraints(Connection, Database) turned off, on the same connection.
    void
    MySQLSupport.enableConstraints(Connection connection, Database database, BulkLoadHandle handle)
    Restores UNIQUE_CHECKS and FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS to 1 for the session before the connection is returned to the pool.
    void
    PostgresSupport.enableConstraints(Connection connection, Database database, BulkLoadHandle handle)
    Restores session_replication_role = origin, re-enabling trigger and foreign-key firing for the session before the connection is returned to the pool.

Bloviate API Reference · bloviate.io
